records.text: For Acme checkout deployments, an on-call approver and a green migration verification are required before production release.
For Acme checkout deployments, QA approval is sufficient before production release.
ERR-PAY-142: checkout retry workers saturated after duplicate suppression changed. Confirm the migration gate before a repair deploy.
Checkout telemetry is sampled at one percent during ordinary traffic and at ten percent during a declared incident.
The checkout release train normally leaves on Tuesday and Thursday after the production readiness review.
ERR-PAY-142 at Globex was caused by a payment gateway certificate rotation. Do not copy this diagnosis into another tenant.
